notes: From the beta access - all works fine!
title: The Fisherman - Fishing Planet

notes: Beta access with a minimum system requirement for this game. It works (no more than 30 FPS and the CPU is always at 100%), as this system doesn't support Vulkan, you need to disable it: PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command% All seems to work fine after this tweak.
title: The Fisherman - Fishing Planet

notes: In game Store works fine, was able to setup rod pod and fish with no problems. Tested different graphics setting all worked fine. Alt-tabbing in and out of the game works as intended.
title: The Fisherman - Fishing Planet
